SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST SAKEENAH B JADORE, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: FEB-06-2007 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-21-2007. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: SUSAN LEE, CSR# 42880. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-09-2007 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OCT-09-2007 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: MAUREEN HOWARD, CSR# 7156. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-09-2007 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No apperance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Maureen Howard, CSR# 7156. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2007 Continued To Oct-09-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 10/09/2007 at 1:30 PM in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Maureen Howard CSR# 7165. (212)
